evidence_note: Used as a real source for orientation-dependent creep mechanisms, slip systems, and gamma-prime rafting at 850 C.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for rejuvenation heat treatment recovering creep life through gamma-prime morphology adjustment.

title: Phase-field-informed machine learning for creep strain prediction in nickel-based superalloys
evidence_note: Used as a real source for phase-field-informed machine learning features in creep strain prediction.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for transfer-learning-guided single-crystal superalloy design and ultrahigh-temperature creep validation.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for molten-salt hot corrosion mechanisms and alloying-element effects.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for pre-oxidation and heat-treatment effects on SLM Inconel 625 hot-corrosion resistance.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for drilled single-crystal superalloy hot-corrosion behavior and diffusion/oxide-layer changes.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for entropy-based low-cycle fatigue life prediction in GH4169.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for PM-HIP superalloy microstructure and fatigue-property review knowledge.

evidence_note: Used as a real source for TiC-containing Inconel 625 microstructure and oxidation-performance knowledge.
